scene.fovPolicy: Scene angular FOV is used directly; physical target size/distance is metadata for object scale context.

lens.numericPolicy: numeric lens controls applied before physics mode

sensor.numericPolicy: sensor asset/reference is loaded first; numeric sensor controls override pixel, exposure, noise, QE, and bit depth.
sensor.resizePolicy: Requested sensor rows/cols preserved; scene and lens FOV are resolved separately.

resolution.scene: Scene angular FOV is used directly; physical target size/distance is metadata for object scale context.
resolution.lens: numeric lens controls applied before physics mode
resolution.physics: selected optics default; no extra synthetic physics mode
resolution.sensor: Requested sensor rows/cols preserved; scene and lens FOV are resolved separately.

staticCamera.provenance: Camera Validation uses Standard Chart Fit framing so Macbeth, slanted-bar, uniform, dead-leaves, point-array, and harmonic targets occupy stable metric regions. CameraE2E headless metric functions are used where available: camera_mtf, camera_color_accuracy, camera_vsnr, sensor_snr, and raytrace PSF helpers. Dead-leaves and harmonic response remain image-derived estimates until dedicated CameraE2E metric functions are exposed. Physical ODD target size/distance is preserved only in the Selected Scene Pipeline run.

tests.source: CameraE2E chart render · standard chart fit + CameraE2E metric function

metrics.label: White point error
metrics.description: Normalized measured-vs-ideal Macbeth white XYZ error.

charts.title: CameraE2E Macbeth color error
charts.description: camera_color_accuracy() patch-level Delta E with measured and ideal Y response.

tests.fovPolicy: Chart angular size is fitted for metric stability; physical ODD target size and distance are not preserved in Camera Validation.

tests.source: CameraE2E chart render · standard chart fit + CameraE2E metric function

charts.title: CameraE2E MTF by spatial frequency
charts.description: camera_mtf() ISO 12233 slanted-edge response. Frequency is reported in cycles/mm.

metrics.description: Texture edge contrast from rendered output.

charts.title: Dead-leaves texture spectrum

charts.description: Final sRGB luma occupancy and channel balance after ISP.

metrics.label: Peak spectral QE

metrics.label: QE channels

metrics.description: camera_vsnr value at the brightest validation level.

charts.title: CameraE2E active sensor QE spectral response
charts.description: sensor_get(sensor, 'spectral qe') after selected sensor constructor, spectral/QE asset, IR filter, and numeric QE scale are applied.

charts.title: CameraE2E sensor SNR over voltage
charts.description: sensor_snr() total SNR with shot/read/DSNU/PRNU components.
